listening.title: Listening: City vs countryside
listening.transcript: Rural life is more peaceful than city life. The city is more developed, but it's also more crowded and more polluted.

questions.question: What is the city like compared to the countryside?
questions.explanation: "The city is more developed, but it's also more crowded and more polluted."

listening.title: Listening: Predicting growth
listening.transcript: The population will grow a lot. The city is going to expand into the countryside. The population here will probably double in ten years.

questions.question: Population may double in ___ years.
questions.explanation: "The population here will probably double in ten years."
